title: Atractocarpus fitzalanii
taxonomy: Atractocarpus fitzalanii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Atractocarpus, which is a group of plants native to Australia. The Rubiaceae family is a large and diverse group of flowering plants commonly known as the madder family. Atractocarpus fitzalanii is typically classified as a shrub or small tree, and its classification is based on its unique characteristics and relationships with other plant species within the Rubiaceae family. Further study and research may be necessary to confirm its exact classification and relationships within the plant kingdom.
